natchitoches-meat-pot-pie.name: Natchitoches Meat Pot Pie

ingredients.item: All-purpose flour plus more for dusting
Sheets store-bought refrigerated pie dough or 2 sheets frozen puff pastry

instructions: Heat oven to 375°. Heat oil in a large wide pot over medium-high heat. Add beef and pork and stir, breaking up with the back of a spoon, until golden brown and liquid is evaporated, about 12 minutes. Mix in onions, celery, bell peppers, and jalapeños and cook, stirring often, until vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes. Add garlic, bay leaves, Creole seasoning, flour, and Worcestershire sauce; cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes. Add tomatoes and broth; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes. Stir in scallions and parsley and let filling cool completely.

Remove bay leaf from filling; discard. Divide filling equally among ramekins. Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface and cut out into six 8" rounds. Whisk egg and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. Brush egg wash around edges of each ramekin; place dough rounds on top. Trim each dough round so it extends only 1/2" beyond surface of ramekin. Crimp dough over sides, pressing to adhere. Brush tops of dough with egg wash and cut 3 slits across the top with a pairing knife. Sprinkle kosher salt over. Place ramekins on a rimmed baking sheet and bake until crusts are golden brown and fillings are bubbling, 35–40 minutes.

neapolitan-milanese-recipe-comedera.name: Neapolitan Milanese Recipe
instructions: Agrega los dos huevos a un bol, sazona con sal y pimienta.
Bate hasta que queden espumosos.
Esparce el pan rallado en un recipiente plano.
Pasa las milanesas de carne por el huevo, luego por el pan rallado.
Warm a frying frying pan with oil and dorate the milanese from both sides until they are crispy.
It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been.
Coloca las milanesas en papel absorbente para retirar el exceso de aceite.
On a plate, put the milanese and baits with a tomato sauce cape. Add the baked ham slice to his top.
Spread mozzarella and sprinkle with some oregan to taste.
Lleva al horno y gratina por aproximadamente 10 minutos.
Remove from the oven and accompany with your favorite garrison, it can be a classic mashed potatoes.

noodles-with-chicken-and-cream-pequerece.name: Noodles With Chicken And Cream

ingredients.item: 1 pechuga de pollo o contramuslos de pollo deshuesados
250 ml of liquid cream or evaporate milk

instructions: We cut the chicken, we sauté it into a frying pan or pan with some extra virgin olive oil
We put evaporated milk and some pitted pink pepper grains. We mix and let them reduce a little. We'll have to put them in the same frying pan.
Cocemos la pasta en agua hirviendo durante el tiempo que indique el paquete.
When I get to the dente we run and add to the chicken. Let's have a good look at the same frying pan so that the flavors are mixed.

nuggets-in-the-air-fryer-teleculinaria.name: Nuggets In The Air Fryer
instructions: Cut the chicken into pieces the same size and put them in a bowl.
Season with chopped garlic teeth, lemon juice, salt and pyri, wrap and let marinate for 20 minutes.
Press the cornflakes with your hands to make them thinner.
Escorra o frango da marinada, passe por farinha e ovo batido e, por fim, pelo flocos de milho.
Put it on air fryer and program 180o for 20 minutes.

nutmeg-and-black-pepper-popovers.name: Nutmeg And Black Pepper Popovers
instructions: Whisk flour, parsley, salt, pepper, and nutmeg in a medium bowl. Whisk eggs and milk in a large bowl until well blended. Gently whisk in flour mixture, followed by 3 Tbsp. butter (do not overmix).

Preheat oven to 425°. Grease 12 standard muffin cups with remaining 2 Tbsp. butter. Pour batter into prepared muffin tins, filling cups three-quarters full and dividing equally. Bake popovers until puffed, golden brown, and crispy around edges, 30-35 minutes. Using a thin knife or an offset spatula, remove popovers from pan. Serve immediately.
Do Ahead: Batter can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
